note: Created integration test file tests/connection_lifecycle.rs with 12 tests covering all 7 scenarios: (1) listen returns positive fd, (2) connect returns positive fd, (3) accept on listener returns WOULD_BLOCK (no real peer), (4) close on connect/listener fds returns WG_OK, (5) double-close returns WG_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE, (6) all 4 functions return WG_ERR_INVALID_HANDLE for bogus handles, (7) connect with invalid address sets last-error detail. Plus a full lifecycle test. All 416 tests pass.
